case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA VS. DARRYL MARACLE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARACLE, DARRYL
